transcript: 藞h瑟t瑟艐 蓱n h蓽r
definitions: Making romantic or sexual advances towards someone.
Flirting with someone in a suggestive way.
examples: He was hitting on her all night at the party.
She didn't realize he was hitting on her until later.
Are you hitting on her or just being friendly?
pastTenses: hit on her (past simple), hit on her (past perfect)
